title: Cancellation exceptions should be re-raised after cleanup
description: This rule checks if a context manager raises a cancellation exception without re-raising it after cleanup.
message: Raise the cancellation exception again after the cleanup.
impact: A cancelled task might continue to run due to failed exception handling, resulting in unintended results.
recommendation: Always re-raise cancellation exceptions after cleanup.

noncompliant.code:
with some_context_manager as cm:
    try:
        do_something()
    finally:
        cm.cleanup()
        raise CancelledError()

compliant.code:
with some_context_manager as cm:
    try:
        do_something()
    finally:
        cm.cleanup()
        raise
        from CancelledError

why_is_this_an_issue: A cancelled task might continue to run due to failed exception handling, resulting in unintended results.
how_to_fix: Always re-raise cancellation exceptions after cleanup.
